results.name: Rwanda
results.key_finding: Tier-5 HRW report documents RDF/M23 war crimes (forced recruitment, child soldiers, executions) in DRC — Rwanda's own conduct — but ACC/INT already near floor, so logged as evidence-tier upgrade and watch flag (defensible re-score 25.0, delta -2.3).

results.name: Starbucks
results.key_finding: Longest strike in company history and no first contract 4+ years post-election reinforce the existing INT/ACC discount, but movement is sub-threshold (re-score 46.9).

results.name: Anthropic
results.key_finding: Commerce-Dept-forced model withdrawal is government action ON Anthropic (perpetrator = government), not scored against it; Anthropic complied transparently while contesting scope — neutral-to-mildly-positive own conduct.

results.name: Afghanistan
results.key_finding: Tier-5 documentation of lethal force against women's-rights protesters (child killed) reinforces the floor; no scorable headroom — evidence-tier upgrade only.

results.name: Democratic Republic of the Congo
results.key_finding: Dual crisis (Ebola PHEIC 896/232; M23/Rwanda abuses) — M23/RDF harm attributed to perpetrators (Rwanda), not DRC the victim entity; near-floor state capacity confirmed.

results.name: Sudan
results.key_finding: UNSC mass-atrocity warning for El Obeid (~500k civilians at risk); pre-atrocity warning at floor — evidence-tier upgrade and urgent watch flag, no scorable movement.

results.name: Apple
results.key_finding: NLRB ULP charge over union store-closure transfer rights is unadjudicated; pre-adjudication discipline = confirm score, continue 2nd-cycle I3 internal-consistency watch.

results.name: Humana
results.key_finding: DOJ FCA complaint (Tier 5) alleges Humana conspired to discriminate against disabled Medicare beneficiaries, plus the nH Predict AI-denial class action survived dismissal — drives EQU/EMP/ACT/ACC down; composite crosses Functional→Developing.

results.name: Nigeria
results.key_finding: 34.7M food-insecure (Borno Phase 5) driven substantially by ISWAP insurgency and aid cuts (external); state-capacity weakness already at Critical baseline — confirmed.

results.name: Bolivia
results.key_finding: 17 blockade-access deaths are protester-caused (attributed externally); state's own conduct is an emergency response to restore access — near-floor, no scorable movement.

results.name: xAI/Grok
results.key_finding: Adjudicated OPC Canada finding (Tier 5) that xAI violated privacy law via non-consensual deepfakes incl. 23,000+ child images, violations continuing — upgrades evidence from allegation to finding, reinforcing the floor.

results.name: UnitedHealth Group
results.key_finding: DOJ criminal probe expanded to Optum Rx and physician reimbursement (pre-adjudication); near-floor at 10.2 — reinforces ACC/INT/SYS evidence tier, no scorable movement.

results.name: DeepMind/Google
results.key_finding: AI Control Roadmap (rogue-agent defenses, live Gemini Spark monitor) is a genuine anticipatory-awareness/systemic artifact reinforcing already-high AWR/SYS; within existing range.

results.name: Meta AI
results.key_finding: Lobbying for KOSA Section 230 immunity to shield 2,400+ child-harm suits is directly anti-accountability, but ACC/INT already near floor — evidence-tier upgrade and watch flag (re-score 24.5).

results.name: Ukraine
results.key_finding: 62,716 civilian casualties (cumulative) are caused by Russian strikes — attributed to the aggressor, not scored against Ukraine; Ukraine maintains functional civilian-protection under duress.

results.name: HollyFrontier
results.key_finding: No window evidence; historical EPA Clean Air Act settlements ($4M + $1.6M, one worker fatality) consistent with baseline; flag for HF Sinclair entity-identity reconciliation.

results.name: Delek Group
results.key_finding: No window evidence; historical OSHA fatal-incident citations (1 willful + 29 serious, 2 deaths) consistent with the Developing baseline.

results.name: PBF Energy
results.key_finding: No window evidence; violation-tracker environmental/safety history (incl. Martinez fires) consistent with baseline.

results.name: Calumet Specialty Products
results.key_finding: No window evidence; renewable-fuels pivot (Montana Renewables) a mild forward positive, insufficient to move baseline.

results.name: FirstCash Holdings
results.key_finding: No window evidence; high-cost-lending model and historical CFPB/Military Lending Act context consistent with the Developing baseline.

math_hygiene_note: All 20 published composites reconstruct within tolerance using the canonical computeCompositeFromDimensions (v1.2). Max drift 0.1 (Meta AI 26.3 vs 26.2), well within the 0.5 flag threshold. No math-hygiene issues.
